isolation.notes: Attempted isolated daemon start with assigned env, but SERVICE currently hardcodes ports 3333/3334 and HOME-based data path; validation executed against active local daemon on localhost:3334.

assertions.reason: `integration list` printed a tabular list including ID/Name/Type/Status columns and active integration rows.
Interactive `integration add webhook` prompted for integration name and webhook config name, then created an entry visible in integration list.
`integration remove <id>` succeeded and the removed webhook no longer appeared in subsequent integration list output.
`mcp list` displayed connected downstream MCPs in tabular form before and after adding a temporary MCP.
`mcp add <name> <command>` successfully registered a temporary stdio MCP and returned created connection ID with tools count.
`dashboard` launched and rendered the TUI; session exited cleanly after sending `q`.
Dashboard render included the `Live Feed` pane label.
Dashboard render included the `Integrations` pane label.
Dashboard render included the `Connected MCPs` pane label.

frictions.description: `integration add webhook` requires two interactive prompts (integration name + schema-derived webhook name).
First temporary mock MCP script was created as ESM `.js` and failed when launched via `node` in this repo context.
frictions.resolution: Replaced with CommonJS `.cjs` mock MCP script for reliable stdio startup.

blockers.description: Assigned isolation ports/data dir could not be enforced because SERVICE runtime/CLI are hardcoded to ports 3333/3334 and HOME-based `.service` paths; isolated daemon start failed with EADDRINUSE on 3333.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Started `dist/main.js` with assigned env vars and isolated HOME; process still attempted 3333/3334 and exited on port conflict.

commandsRun.command: env SERVICE_DATA_DIR=/tmp/service-utv-m2-g1 SERVICE_MCP_PORT=3433 SERVICE_ADMIN_PORT=3434 HOME=/tmp/service-utv-m2-g1-home node dist/main.js
commandsRun.observation: Daemon attempted to bind 3333 and crashed with EADDRINUSE; env ports not honored.
Displayed integrations table with active rows.
Completed interactive prompts and created webhook integration.
Listed existing downstream MCP connections in table.

commandsRun.command: node dist/cli/index.js mcp add utvmock node /tmp/service-utv-m2-g1/mock-mcp.cjs
commandsRun.observation: Temporary MCP connected with 1 available tool and returned connection ID.
Dashboard launched and rendered panes including Live Feed/Integrations/Connected MCPs before clean exit.

summary: Validated 9 assigned CLI assertions: all passed on real CLI/TUI surface with evidence captured. One environment-level blocker remains: SERVICE currently ignores assigned isolation ports/data-dir env settings, so tests had to run against the existing localhost:3334 daemon.
